name: MsgReplay
comment:
Reliable hot reloading for Elm programs!


# Programs

This API mirrors the `elm/browser` package found [here](https://package.elm-lang.org/packages/elm/browser/latest).

@docs Program, application, document, element

values.name: application
values.comment: Create an application that manages Url changes. More about that [here](https://package.elm-lang.org/packages/elm/browser/latest/Browser#application).
values.type: { init : flags -> Url.Url -> Browser.Navigation.Key -> ( model, Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg ), update : msg -> model -> ( model, Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg ), subscriptions : model -> Platform.Sub.Sub msg, view : model -> Browser.Document msg, onUrlChange : Url.Url -> msg, onUrlRequest : Browser.UrlRequest -> msg, encodeMsg : msg -> Json.Encode.Value, msgDecoder : Json.Decode.Decoder msg, initMsgs : flags -> Maybe.Maybe String.String, saveMsgs : String.String -> Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg } -> MsgReplay.Program flags model msg

values.name: document
values.comment: Create an HTML document managed by Elm. More about that [here](https://package.elm-lang.org/packages/elm/browser/latest/Browser#document).
values.type: { init : flags -> ( model, Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg ), update : msg -> model -> ( model, Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg ), subscriptions : model -> Platform.Sub.Sub msg, view : model -> Browser.Document msg, encodeMsg : msg -> Json.Encode.Value, msgDecoder : Json.Decode.Decoder msg, initMsgs : flags -> Maybe.Maybe String.String, saveMsgs : String.String -> Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg } -> MsgReplay.Program flags model msg

values.name: element
values.comment: Create an HTML element managed by Elm. More about that [here](https://package.elm-lang.org/packages/elm/browser/latest/Browser#element).
values.type: { init : flags -> ( model, Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg ), update : msg -> model -> ( model, Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg ), subscriptions : model -> Platform.Sub.Sub msg, view : model -> Html.Html msg, encodeMsg : msg -> Json.Encode.Value, msgDecoder : Json.Decode.Decoder msg, initMsgs : flags -> Maybe.Maybe String.String, saveMsgs : String.String -> Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg } -> MsgReplay.Program flags model msg
